# Yohaku Companion v1.7.4

## Highlights

- Simplified Live Desk setup for current Companion Protocol v2 servers; supported Core releases no longer require a separate Live Desk environment flag.

## Fixes and reliability

- Fixed the Done and Close actions in Cached Application Icons so the sheet now dismisses reliably from the SwiftUI settings presentation.
- Updated server compatibility messaging to distinguish an unsupported Live Desk protocol from an operator-disabled feature.

## Update notes

- When upgrading Core to `v13.13.1` or later, remove the obsolete `COMPANION_LIVE_DESK_ENABLED` setting. Pairing and explicit sanitized-preview consent remain required before publishing.
